relationships: kab:Ur yelli ara deg telzemt ass-a, neɣ yella﹖

kab:Yella ḥedd i yellan tura neɣ yella yakan daki
kab:Ur tessinem ara ad temmeslayem tafṛansist neɣ ala﹖
